subject: Three humanoid figures celebrate with a white unicorn in a flower-lined courtyard
description: A white unicorn prances energetically at the center of the scene in a sunlit courtyard framed by flowering vines and a stone archway. Three humanoid figures surround it in joyful celebration: one on the left plays a small horn and wears flowers in their hair; one in the center raises their hands in delight; one on the right waves a triangular pennant flag. All figures are dressed in light, festive clothing. The mood is exuberant and communal, with warm light and abundant pink and white blooms filling the background.
foreground: White unicorn prancing, three figures celebrating around it on stone courtyard
background: Stone archway with flowering vines, warm sunlight, lush garden greenery
emotion: Joyful, celebratory, communal — figures are laughing and cheering
